lm_studio.application_version_source: LM Studio.app Info.plist CFBundleShortVersionString and CFBundleVersion
lm_studio.api_version_evidence: Native model discovery used /api/v1/models; that endpoint does not itself report the LM Studio application version.

evidence.basis: The user requests a codebase inspection of specific components (event logs, LM Studio security, and prompt trust boundaries) without modifying files.

acceptance_criteria: An investigation report or summary of findings for the persistent event logs within 'crates/store' is generated.
suggested_subtasks.objective: Investigate the persistent event log implementation in crates/store.

acceptance_criteria: An investigation report or summary of findings regarding LM Studio security within 'crates/backends' is generated.
suggested_subtasks.objective: Investigate LM Studio security implementation in crates/backends.

acceptance_criteria: An investigation report or summary of findings regarding prompt trust boundaries within 'crates/prompting' is generated.
suggested_subtasks.objective: Investigate prompt trust boundaries in crates/prompting.
